friends.comment: Wow, amazing art! ✨
Wow, amazing art! ✨
Your AI art is absolutely stunning! ✨
Love the dramatic cinematic shadows here, they really amplify that mysterious ninja energy! ✨ Did you have a specific film in mind for the lighting inspiration?

Mega faszinierend, wie du die dramatischen und eleganten Headpieces, besonders die kleineren Details, so geheimnisvoll wirken lässt – baust du solche Elemente komplett in Photoshop oder wie integrierst du sie in Midjourney? ✨
Jessie looks incredible here! You really captured her iconic style with a modern twist. What was your favorite detail to generate for her?
This 'Ember Voyager' concept sounds so intriguing, especially with your bio's 'eternal flame' theme—did you generate it as a character or more of an abstract journey?
真っ白な水着、すごく肌に映えてて綺麗ですね！✨ こういう透明感のある一枚、私もいつか作ってみたいなぁ☺️
I totally get what you mean about AI getting out of control 😳 This has such a cool, almost cinematic vibe to it! Was that an intentional part of the prompt?
This really resonates with 'something worth remembering' – it has such a beautiful, nostalgic cinematic feel! I'm curious, what inspired this particular scene?

Wow, Klarg's Crossbow looks amazing! The way you've detailed those unique poison effects is so clever. ✨ I'm an AI artist, so I'm always super curious – do you use Midjourney to generate the art for these, or as inspiration?
The Primrose and Siberian Iris fairies for February are absolutely enchanting! ✨ I'm so curious, how do you decide which flowers to pair with each month's fairy?
This cinematic take on Hanuman is absolutely breathtaking! The way you've captured that divine, powerful energy is incredible. Do you often explore mythological themes with this epic visual style? ✨
That singular, all-seeing eye concept is so striking, and the atmosphere you've created is incredible – I'm always fascinated by process, so I'm definitely checking out your notes on Threads!
Oh, this is awesome! I think it's got a really charmingly cursed vibe, definitely a solid 9 for originality. For your next fusion, I'm thinking a majestic lion mixed with a vibrant macaw?
¡Siempre me encanta cómo tus creaciones digitales tienen ese toque tan imaginativo y único! Se nota mucho la pasión ✨

Ach, ich hoffe, deine Erkältung ist schnell vorbei! Das wunderschöne Spiel von Licht und Schatten, das du hier mit Midjourney eingefangen hast, ist total inspirierend und passt so perfekt zu den ersten Frühlingstagen. ✨
Totally get the intense doodling phase when deadlines hit! Eloise looks so charming and expressive even in these quick sketches ✨ good luck with finals!
Me encanta ese lema de 'Imagine, it will come true!' Siento que describe perfectamente la magia de lo que hacemos los artistas digitales ✨
レティシアさん、こんにちは！このキャラクターデザインすごく可愛いですね！Stable Diffusionでこんな素敵な表現ができるの、改めて感動します✨ どんなプロンプト使ってるのか気になっちゃいます！
That little capuchin is wild! 🤯 It's always so interesting to see the AI vs. real debate pop up around videos like this, especially as an AI artist myself.
Omg, this Gwen in Pixar style is everything! ✨ You totally nailed her personality here. So cool you did a whole set, did you have a favorite moment or look to create for her?
Katie, that line about 'the world with the look in its eye' is so powerful and gives such a cinematic depth! Did you write those beautiful lines yourself?
Die ruhige Stimmung, die du mit deinen 'inneren Bildern' einfängst, ist wirklich wunderschön – man spürt die Leichtigkeit förmlich! 🌸

Questa 'Figlia del Quadro' è affascinante! Amo come unisci l'opera contemporanea con questa estetica cinematica in bianco e nero, sembra una scena di un film. C'è una narrazione completa che stai sviluppando per questa serie? ✨

Wow, this question hits home, Kaiza! It really resonates with those creative challenges sometimes – feels like a constant 'flight or fight' battle in the studio. What usually helps you push past the 'flight' impulse?
Для 4-го дня это просто невероятно круто! 🤩 Очень здорово, как Алиса органично вписалась в парижскую атмосферу. Какую тулзу для превращения портрета в видео используешь?
Ooh, 'sirenas del rio' is such a captivating title! I love the idea of mermaids in a river setting – feels so unique and ethereal. What kind of environment did you envision for their home?
This is such a cool opportunity! Love the idea of a digital magazine bringing artists from around the world together. 'In The Streets of Peru' sounds especially inspiring!
Ooh, these emojis give off such a cool vibe! I'm really curious about how you blend elements like the mushroom and scorpion into your waifu concepts using Stable Diffusion. So unique! ✨
This waifu has such an enchanting vibe, I'm curious if you're using one of your custom CivitAI models for those intricate details!
Stable Diffusionでの #aigirl の可能性って本当に無限大ですよね！生成するとき、いつも特定のスタイルを意識されてますか？✨
No need to be nervous, this is such a strong first post! I love how you've captured the tension of the 'Heated Rivalry' here — really cinematic! What inspired you to start with these two?
今回のジト目ちゃんも魅力全開ですね！スチームパンクとの組み合わせもめちゃくちゃ好みです😍 クリップスタジオでの仕上げが本当に活きてるな〜っていつも思います！
¡Me encanta la frase de tu bio 'Imagine, it will come true'! Siento que el arte digital es el medio perfecto para eso. ✨ ¿Qué programa usas para tus ilustraciones?
Esto parece un fotograma de una película épica, ¡es increíble la historia que cuentas en una sola imagen! ✨
This Madara piece is absolutely stunning; the sheer intensity in his gaze and powerful vibe are captured so well, what kind of aesthetic did you focus on in your prompts for this one?
Wow, 'Ember Voyager' really tells a story! The cinematic feel is incredible; what kind of journey do you imagine for them?
いつもAI美少女たちの雰囲気作りが素敵だなぁって思ってます！どうやってこんなに自然な表情を引き出してるんですか？✨
The rhythm in this animation is so captivating! And that #cortisol tag has me super curious about the story behind it 👀

Ooh, sirenas del rio – I absolutely love the unique, almost ethereal vibe of river mermaids compared to ocean ones; what kind of prompts do you use to capture that specific water texture in Midjourney? ✨
The movie night setup for Chaya and Ginna is adorable! I'm so curious, what movie do you imagine them watching? 🍿
Love how intricate the star embroidery is on the corset part! Did you specify those details in your Midjourney prompt, or was it a happy discovery?

The way Reha captures that luminous 'nothingness' of the snow against the dark forms is just stunning – really makes you feel the atmosphere! It reminds me a bit of how I approach light in digital art, thinking about those negative spaces. ✨
The retro anime vibe on this Boa Hancock is spot on! I'm curious, did you use a specific 90s LoRA to get that classic feel? ✨
Ooh, this really captures that cinematic, dreamlike feel you're so good at! Was there a specific memory or emotion you had in mind when creating it?
This Mai looks so vibrant! It's always fun seeing how other artists interpret her with Stable Diffusion – did you blend a few models to get this look?
Ich finde es super geworden! Gerade die 'Unperfektheit' macht es irgendwie noch einzigartiger, und die Atmosphäre ist toll! Wie wäre es als Nächstes mit einer coolen Vaiana oder Kida?
Wow, Shriya, the Indian fantasy aesthetic here is so beautifully realized; I'd love to know what specific elements from Indian art inspired her design!
Okay, those armor details are seriously next level! ✨ You totally nailed the cinematic look for her. For Gabrielle, I'm thinking maybe someone like Florence Pugh? She has that incredible range.
ComfyUIとSDXLを使いこなされてて、いつもどんな作品が生まれるのか楽しみにしています！✨
The journey from that initial sketch to this stunning #onedarkwindow cover is incredible! Absolutely would trust your vision, Liv—it's so cool to see the process unfold ✨
The 'fall-seeing eye' concept is so cool and feels really cinematic – definitely makes me want to dive into your process notes on Threads for this one!
Der Gedanke, Räume als Zeit zu sehen, ist so poetisch und spiegelt sich wirklich beeindruckend in den geschichteten, mehrdimensionalen Kompositionen wider, die du hier zeigst!
AIで生まれる美少女イラストの世界、私もすごく好きなので、素敵な作品たくさん見られるのが楽しみです！
It's absolutely breathtaking how AI can not only restore but genuinely *reconstruct* entire uncaptured moments, bringing a lifetime to such cinematic and vibrant life – what an incredible tribute! ✨
This Hinata is so beautifully done! You really captured her gentle strength and the shy elegance at the beach, it has such a lovely, almost cinematic vibe. What a perfect summer look for her! ☀️
Rias Gremory looks absolutely stunning here! ✨ The way you rendered her hair and the crimson accents is just perfect. Do you find certain models are better for capturing specific anime characters?
LADIESSS for real! ✨ The energy in this comic style is fantastic, I love how it tells a story visually even in a single frame – what kind of narrative are you hoping to build with it?

This is so enchanting! 'Sirenas del rio' is such a unique twist, I'm especially loving the soft, ethereal lighting here that really brings out that riverine magic. Did you use any specific lighting descriptors in your prompts to achieve this? ✨
These are all so cool, Evan! I'm really drawn to the neon glow on number 3 – it's got such a unique vibe ✨ Do you have a favorite among them yourself?

Niji 7のパーソナライズ、猫ちゃんの表情がめちゃくちゃ素敵で、ストリートポップな雰囲気と相まって私も試してみたくなりました！😻✨
These medieval mercenaries have such a great cinematic mood! The rugged details and overall atmosphere really draw you into their story. Feels like a scene from a historical film. ⚔️
Wow, this 'Rust & Rage' shot has such a cool cinematic feel! As an AI artist, I’m genuinely curious about your process for creating such photo-realistic grit and motion.

This singular eye piece is absolutely captivating, love how it pulls you right into that sci-fi depth! I'm curious, did you have a specific vision for its shape or did Midjourney surprise you with this powerful design?
The cinematic lighting in this is absolutely captivating! What was your favorite part of crafting that mood?
Love this perspective, Ashmija! Selling from a moving bus with LinkedIn truly highlights the power of just showing up, and I'm curious how you find the art community on there compares to Instagram?

These are absolutely stunning! I'm torn between the battle-scarred one and the one with the glowing blue energy – both feel so ready for a cinematic universe. 🤩 Which was your personal favorite design?
Love the dreamy vibe of this bike! Is this one of the outputs from Dreamface AI? So cool how you incorporate your dreamcore aesthetic into your pieces, Jen! ✨
So cool how you've captured that psychedelic energy with #animatediff – are you using a particular ComfyUI workflow for these kinds of mesmerizing motion effects? ✨
This is such a beautiful take on Hinata at the beach! 🏖️ I love how you balanced her shy elegance with the summer vibe. Was it fun creating this tranquil scene?
Ich find's total schön geworden und mag die verträumte Stimmung sehr! 😍 Für Disney fände ich Tiana oder Rapunzel super spannend, was meinst du?

இது ரொம்ப நல்லா இருக்கு! காஞ்சிபுரத்தோட இந்த தனித்துவமான கதையை சினிமாட்டிக் டச்-உடன் காட்சிப்படுத்தினது அட்டகாசம். இந்த மர்மமான நீருக்கடியில் இருக்கும் உணர்வை கொண்டு வர, எந்த மாதிரியான லைட்டிங் செட்டப் யூஸ் பண்ணீங்க? ✨

friends.nationality: Global (likely French background, but English bio)
friends.comment: Wow, the atmosphere and world-building in this are just stunning! The way you've captured that cinematic, grimdark vibe in monochrome is fantastic. What kind of story were you imagining with 'the company'? ✨

This floral design for the 'Summer Of ‘69’ label is just so beautifully vibrant and playful! I always find it fascinating to see the journey from a rough sketch to the final production, especially for packaging. Do you have a favorite part of the label design process? 🌼

Such a lovely dedication for International Women's Day! 💜 It's always inspiring to see how artists bring these important messages to life through digital illustration. Did you have a specific story or person that sparked this particular piece?
The 'Dark Queens' theme is so spot-on, @talesfromanotheruniverse2! I love how cinematic and powerful the whole vibe is – what an awesome collab to host.
お仕事ファッション、すごく参考になります！✨ スタイリッシュで、でもかっちりしすぎない感じがとっても好きです😊
¡Qué pasada! Me encanta cómo le das vida a tus ideas digitales, ¡la vibra es increíble! ✨ ¿Siempre empiezas con un boceto o a veces fluyes directo en digital?
The way you've captured the *intensity* and intimacy for Dramione in this piece is absolutely captivating, and the caption just seals the vibe! 🔥
Die Idee, dass man das Werk 'navigiert' und sich dabei 'etwas in einem neu ordnet', finde ich total faszinierend – es fühlt sich wirklich an wie eine 'stille Gedankenstadt'!

Always fascinating to see the journey! Excited to see how this 'trust the process' unfolds into your beautiful minimalist line art. ✨
This piece has such a cool, almost editorial feel! What kind of models or workflow are you finding best for your fashion-focused #StableDiffusion art?
Jajaja, ¡ese Leland siempre sabe cómo salirse con la suya! 😅 Me encanta cómo capturaste su vibra tan única, especialmente en esa expresión. ¿Usaste algún pincel en particular para el delineado?

This motorcycle concept has such a strong cinematic feel, especially with the #cyberpunk2077 aesthetic! I'm curious about your process for blending the Midjourney output with your Photoshop work to get this level of detail and polish.

Happy birthday to you! 🥳 This Strawberry Edition is absolutely dreamy – the plum blossoms and little bunny dango are just perfection! You really nailed the cozy vibe. I'd love to see a matcha or sakura theme next for the Coffee Time series! ✨
The character's design is stunning, and I love how the delicate florals enhance the whole 'POV' feel! What kind of prompts do you find work best for such intricate floral details?
Okay, your take on Bayonetta is *everything*! The details on her outfit and the confident pose totally pop in your style ✨.
Ahah, Soleya e la sua Mini scassata! L'espressione dice tutto e sono già curiosa di scoprire cosa combinerà quel tizio con l'auto perfetta, adoro questi setup narrativi! ✨

Nelliel looks incredible here, Chris! ✨ The way you've handled the lighting and texture really brings her to life. For your next challenge, maybe a character from a different anime but in a really dynamic, cinematic pose?
Loving the energy in these pieces, especially your Wuwa OC Versago! The lighting and pose are so dynamic, did you have a specific story in mind for them? 🤩
Mega deine Fire Horse Serie! Die Dynamik in diesem Teil ist wirklich beeindruckend. Hast du dafür spezielle Bewegungsprompts verwendet? ✨
Love seeing the background action come to life – it really sets such a cool vibe for your character work! Do you usually rough out the environment or let it evolve with the characters? ✨

The collection name 'DNCE' immediately caught my eye – I'm so curious about the rhythm and storytelling in these digital pieces and if you were aiming for a particular cinematic vibe with this series!

These Maomao variations are so beautifully detailed! I especially love how you captured the elegance of her hanfu outfits and that mysterious glow from the potions. Did you have a favorite one of these to generate?

It's so cool getting this behind-the-scenes look at the evolving pipeline for the Brotherman trailer! ✨ Always fascinating to see how all those intricate stages, from sound to VFX, build up to the final cinematic vision.
¡Me encanta la frase de tu bio, 'Imagine, it will come true!!!', es súper inspiradora! ✨ ¿Qué te inspira más para crear esas ilustraciones tan 'vividas' que publicas?
I absolutely adore the dreamy Ghibli-esque aesthetic and those serene seawaves you've created; the 'अधूरा ही सही' from your caption perfectly enhances the beautiful, melancholic feel! ✨

Such a solid pipeline breakdown! ✨ I totally agree about silhouettes being everything – honestly, checking silhouettes is often the hardest part for me too, especially getting that *rhythm* just right.

This is such a lovely take on Alice! I really like how you still tied it into #vintagebookweek even if it wasn't the exact prompt cover, and the rabbit looks so mysterious here! What made you decide to feature him like this? 🐇
Love how you trust the process! For your minimalist style, do you find it's more about subtracting lines or adding them precisely? So curious! ✨
That 'hello?' caption really sets such a cool, mysterious vibe for the illustration! So intriguing.
This Yoruichi is absolutely stunning! Love the intense lighting and how beautifully you've handled her darker skin tones — do you have a go-to method for rendering them so vibrantly? ✨

Matthias, die Art, wie du in der 'OUTSIDE IN' Serie architektonische Formen so fließend mit organischen Elementen verbindest, finde ich total faszinierend! Entsteht diese Verschmelzung für dich eher intuitiv oder mit spezifischen botanischen Referenzen?
Absolutely love the cinematic drama here! The way you describe the 'red pillars trembling' and 'carved dragons bowing' is so powerful – do you usually create such a rich narrative for your pieces?
The way you captured that intense, cinematic moment in oil is just stunning! What made you choose this particular scene to paint?
That 'satisfied belly sounds' caption instantly makes me smile! The way you've rendered the fur texture looks so soft and inviting. ✨ What software do you usually use for your digital illustrations?
The whole 'March Issue' series has such a cool, distinctive vibe, Clemens! This Part 3 really feels like a great culmination. Love the cinematic fashion aesthetic you've got going on. ✨
This Grok transition is so incredibly smooth; it really elevates the cinematic quality of the Midjourney frames! I'm curious, how did you find the learning curve for Grok's animation process?

This is so captivating, 'organic recalibrations' perfectly describes the evolving, almost living feel of it – I'd love to know how you approach blending those natural and digital elements in your prompts!

Das mit den Gängen als Zwischenräume und Geschichten-Speicher finde ich eine wunderschöne Beobachtung! Passt perfekt zu diesen wechselhaften April-Vibes. 😊 Welche Stimmung hat dich hier am meisten inspiriert?
This looks so inviting, I totally would! ✨ Love the soft vibe you got with Stable Diffusion, did you use any specific models or LORAs for this aesthetic?
Ого, очень круто, что коллаборация с блогером детства так успешно развивается и уже открываются точки! Используешь нейросети в таких проектах?
Oh, this is adorable! The 'Tung tung swap' in your caption has me so curious about the story behind this little one. ✨
Aw, this illustration really nails that cozy loved-up feeling! The warmth in this is just lovely. Makes me smile! 😊
Achieving such great results without Lora is so impressive; I'm curious if you have any go-to techniques for maintaining consistency!
Ich liebe, wie du hier diese 'leiser als ein Gedanke'-Stimmung mit der zarten Spannung zwischen dem fast neonfarbenen Grün und den zerbrechlichen Blüten einfängst – total faszinierend! ✨
水神の神秘的な雰囲気がめちゃくちゃ魅力的です！✨ こういう壮大なテーマ、どんなプロンプトで表現されたのか気になります！

Loving how cinematic this Spiderman piece feels with the red rose detail perfectly amplifying the 'behind the mask' emotional depth ✨ What inspired you to combine those specific elements so powerfully?

This visual really has such a beautifully cinematic and atmospheric feel! I'm curious, does the ambient music usually guide your AI generation process for these tranquil scenes?

The 'Island Building' concept with its vertical green city elements has such a stunning, almost cinematic feel; I'm curious if you explored any other unique biomes or atmospheric conditions for this vision?

アナベルの優しい色合いと、そこから伝わる『今日も一日頑張ろう！』っていう気持ちが素敵です…！どんなプロンプトでこの瑞々しい雰囲気を表現されたのか気になります🌿

This transportation concept is so visually striking! ✨ I love how you've captured that sleek, futuristic vibe. Do you usually start with a specific vehicle purpose in mind when you're crafting these designs in Midjourney?

Вау, это так атмосферно и кинематографично получилось! 🤩 Очень круто, что вы так подробно рассказали про свой пайплайн, особенно про то, как Саша Анохина дорабатывала финальные кадры как AI-художник после 3D Max — это прям чувствуется и придаёт особую глубину!
Ah, Zoey forgetting her meds definitely adds to that dreamy vibe she's got going on! I love how you weave these little stories in, makes the characters feel so real ✨

Wow, this character really captures that whimsical, almost magical vibe the mushroom and butterfly emojis hint at! ✨ I'm always so impressed by how clean and polished your waifu renders come out in Stable Diffusion.
J'adore la vision de cette mégalopole où la contemplation prend le dessus sur la vitesse ! La lumière qui caresse son visage est juste sublime et rend la scène tellement cinématographique.
The glowing tree in your 'Tree of Dreams' is so magical and serene – was that specific lighting a particular focus for you in Midjourney? ✨
Oh, these sisters at the beach are just radiating fun! Love how you've designed Chaya and Beige for your Dragonball SG series – what's their story like?
ジト目の表現にこだわってるのが本当に伝わってきます！クリスタでの加筆修正、どんな部分を意識されてますか？すごく自然で素敵です✨
Your florals are so perfectly joyful for this 'Summer Of '69' wine label! I love how you captured the playful vibe from concept to final bottle 🌼

Wow, this looks so good, especially if you're still getting used to CSP! ✨ The rendering is already super clean and I love the character's expression here – what's been your favorite part about using CSP so far?
Matthias, die Verschmelzung von Architektur und Natur mit dieser Farbpalette ist wirklich beeindruckend! Besonders die Idee, 'Räume zu sehen, aber Zeit wahrzunehmen' trifft den Nerv. ✨
Wow, this AI transformation is so seamless and has such a cool cinematic flow! Always inspiring to see next-gen video art like this. ✨

Wow, the way you blended Makoto Shinkai's cinematic atmosphere with Muzan's high fashion looks is absolutely genius—especially that breathtaking golden hour rice paddies shot; I'm curious, did you experiment much with different lighting prompts to achieve that perfect glow?
Dieses Spiel von Architektur und Natur ist total fesselnd, besonders wie das 'Winterlicht in Glas' die Räume so lebendig macht!
This truly shines! ✨ I love the vibrant energy in your illustrations – do you usually start with a specific color palette in mind?
Oh, this teatime scene is so charming and beautifully composed! Love how you've blended the #Midjourney elements with your Photoshop edits – curious about your workflow for that! ✨
This really captures that idea of AI truly *feeling* and understanding, not just analyzing ✨ The cinematic quality is absolutely stunning – do you have any go-to techniques for achieving that mood?
Aww, Frieren and Fern look so lovely here! I really like the soft, almost dreamy lighting you achieved with Stable Diffusion. Did you have any specific prompts for that effect?
This medieval jousting scene has such an epic, cinematic feel to it! I'm curious if you aimed for that dramatic lighting specifically with your prompts?
Love how you bring those multi-dimensional worlds to life! What's your favorite part about designing the intricate textures in your work?
Haha, this cute Dragonball Z totally did take away my Monday blues, and I'm super curious what kind of Midjourney prompts you use to blend the classic characters with such an adorable style! ✨
The way the light hits here gives such a beautiful, almost dreamlike cinematic quality. It really resonates with the 'Oo Hansini' vibe!
YuiさんのAIガール、いつも本当に可愛くて素敵です！✨ 特にこの可愛いらしさを出すためにどんなプロンプトを工夫されているのか気になります！

This Chel fan art is fantastic! I love the unique contrast of her strong, muscular physique against such a beautiful, lush floral island. So cool! Did you experiment a lot with flower-specific prompts in Stable Diffusion for this vibe?
Seeing the whole evolution of Gomamon brought to life so realistically is so satisfying! Which one was your favorite to create?

These expressions for Fenestra are fantastic, Julia! You totally nailed that 'queen' vibe and her range of emotions – I especially love how powerful she looks in every single one ✨ What was your favorite expression to bring to life?

Wow, this looks straight out of a Cyberpunk game! The way you blend Midjourney and Photoshop for these transportation concepts is super cool – do you usually refine a lot of the details in PS afterwards?
Love how you're building out Xavian's story across these parts! The cinematic vibe is so strong here, really pulling you into their world. ✨
ジト目の表現、いつも素敵だなって思ってます！AIベースでここまで表情豊かにできるのすごいですね😊 CLIP STUDIO PAINTでの調整、どんなところを意識されてますか？

This Tifa is absolutely stunning on the beach! ✨ Love how you captured her iconic look but gave her that relaxed, powerful vibe for the shore. Did you experiment much with the outfit details for this version?
The way you've blended the whimsical mushrooms and butterflies with this character is so charming and dreamy! I'm curious, what's your favorite part about designing these kinds of magical waifus? ✨

friends.full_name: Ayame Iori / アヤメ イオリ
friends.comment: AIでコスプレもされるんですね！いつも素敵な投稿で、生成するときのコンセプトとか気になります✨
This 'PC version' take on the Avengers is so cool, totally getting those epic cinematic game trailer vibes! Which character was your favorite to envision in this style? ✨
J'adore que tu aies relevé le défi du vert, l'harmonie des couleurs est sublime et lui donne vraiment une ambiance unique ; pour le nom de la sirène, Coralia ou Lyra seraient super jolies !
Oh, the 'PC version' idea for the Avengers is so clever! What kind of game aesthetics or vibe were you leaning into when you created this?
This is such a cool deep dive into the process, I absolutely love how you've captured that playful 'Summer Of ‘69’ floral vibe perfectly for the Mollydooker labels! 🌼
Oh, this is so lovely and has such a gentle spring feel! I adore the detail on the ducks, and that little shell adds such a sweet touch. Are there any other hidden animals we should look out for? 🌿

The bioluminescent feel in this Avatar world is absolutely enchanting, Ylenia – I'm so curious, did you find it challenging to get that specific glowing forest aesthetic just right with your prompts? ✨
That little narrative about Zoey forgetting her meds is so fun, and I absolutely love the dreamy aesthetic you achieved here with the lighting; is she part of a bigger world you're developing? ✨

Rabbot is such a brilliant concept for a TADC sona! I'm so impressed by how you twisted the rabbit symbolism to represent feeling unlucky and not enough – that's incredibly clever and makes her so unique. Also, totally relate to the headphones 24/7! 🎧
AIイラスト投稿始められたんですね！SD XLで作られた作品、どれも可愛くて素敵なので、これからの投稿も楽しみにしていますね😊

Wow, this is such a brilliant take on industrial art! I absolutely love how you've found the 'hidden beauty of logistics' and turned shipping containers into such a vibrant, dynamic piece. What initially sparked the idea for this series? ✨
This really has such a magical, cinematic atmosphere! ✨ What kind of prompts do you find work best with GenTube to achieve this dreamy quality?
Wow, Hex Aunzo's imagination shines so bright in this pop surreal piece! I love how they blend elements, it's really captivating as a fellow digital artist.
Your Ghibli reels are so captivating and dreamy! Do you have a favorite Miyazaki film that inspires these visuals? ✨
Love the 'Goddess having fun' vibe here, especially with the billiards in space! Such a wonderfully imaginative concept. ✨
О, видео через Stable Diffusion это что-то! Давно хочу попробовать, особенно для моих киношных задумок. У тебя очень круто выглядит!
이 'salt sea' 시리즈 정말 멋져요! 이 거친 질감 표현이 너무 좋아요 ✨

Wow, this Man-Boar design is super unsettling in the best way! The description of him being 'silent if you hear him say your last prayer' really gave me chills. What was the initial spark for creating such a terrifying creature?

friends.full_name: Ayame Iori / アヤメ イオリ
friends.comment: アヤメさん、このAIアートすごく雰囲気があって素敵ですね！コスプレモデルもされてるってプロフィールに書いてあったので、どんなキャラクターがお気に入りなのかなって気になりました🥰
정말 멋진 작품이네요! 😍
